page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8ia.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance configured with 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture. The system is powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core allocation. It features 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 6.0 GB per core.

Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA L20 GPU based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, equipped with 48 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps, and the instance runs on a KVM hypervisor.

This hardware profile is designed for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and GPU acceleration without local storage dependencies. Suitable applications include machine learning inference, data science pipelines, and graphics rendering. The dedicated AMD EPYC cores and NVIDIA L20 GPU provide a balanced resource-to-compute ratio for enterprise-scale parallel processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8ia.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores operating at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding 6.0 GB per core, and runs on a KVM hypervisor. Graphics and parallel computing acceleration are provided by a single NVIDIA L20 GPU from the Ada Lovelace family, which includes 48 GB of VRAM. The instance does not feature local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 40 Gbps. This configuration is optimized for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, and parallel processing tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU cores and specialized GPU acceleration.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and NVIDIA Ada Lovelace graphics for parallel processing and machine learning workloads.
